description_long: This is a white golf ball with a dimpled surface, designed for use in the sport of golf. The ball features several printed logos and text in blue, black, and gray, including branding and motivational phrases. The dimples are evenly distributed across the entire surface, enhancing aerodynamic performance. The ball appears to be made of a hard, glossy outer shell, likely a synthetic polymer, with a solid or air-filled core. There are no visible seams, and the surface shows some minor discoloration and scuff marks, indicating light use. The overall appearance is that of a standard, professional-grade golf ball.
description: A white, dimpled golf ball with blue and black printed logos and text, showing minor scuff marks. The surface is hard and glossy, typical of professional golf balls.
description_view_0: This view highlights the 'THORNLEYS' blue logo and partial black text, with dimples clearly visible and minor scuffing near the bottom.
description_view_1: This view shows the 'TRUSOFT' branding in gray and a partial blue and black logo, with the dimple pattern prominent.
description_view_2: This view features the 'CREATE STAGE INSPIRE' black and blue logo, as well as the 'TRU' text, with the dimples and some surface wear visible.
description_view_3: This view displays the 'TRUSOFT' text in gray and part of the blue 'THORNLEYS' logo, with a clear view of the dimpled surface and some discoloration.
attribute_brand_logo: Blue 'THORNLEYS' text and logo on one side, black 'CREATE STAGE INSPIRE' text with blue arrow on another side, and gray 'TRUSOFT' text; all logos are printed directly on the ball's surface.
attribute_sport-specific_markings: Dimpled surface pattern covering the entire ball, gray 'TRUSOFT' text, and other printed branding typical for golf balls.
attribute_wear_pattern: Minor scuff marks and slight discoloration visible near the bottom and around some dimples.
